ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the student belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "admission_year" INTEGER /* Year the student was admitted to the university */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Expected graduation year of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., active, on leave, graduated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department chair */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department (e.g., building and room number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "syllabus_link" TEXT /* Link to the course syllabus */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary instructor for the course */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "is_elective" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the course is elective or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the term during which the student is enrolled */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., pending, confirmed, dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term (e.g., 2020C) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year of the term */,
  "term_type" TEXT /* Type of term (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment for which the grade is recorded */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was recorded */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of grade (e.g., midterm, final, project) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course that has the prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" TEXT /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course availability record */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the term in which the course is available */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the course is available in the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_availability_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_availability_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course resource */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., textbook, online material) */,
  "resource_link" TEXT /* Link or reference to the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the faculty member (e.g., professor, associate professor) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the faculty member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the faculty member */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the faculty member was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_faculty" (
  "course_faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-faculty assignment */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member assigned to teach the course */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the term in which the faculty member is teaching */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the faculty member is teaching */,
  "teaching_load" INTEGER /* Teaching load of the faculty member for the term (e.g., number of hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_faculty_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_faculty_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_faculty_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_faculty_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor, Master, Doctorate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course the section belongs to */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the term the section is offered in */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the section */,
  "classroom" TEXT /* Location of the classroom */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the section */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the section */,
  "days" TEXT /* Days of the week the section is offered (e.g., MWF, TTh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the student */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the status was changed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_status_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
